scripts.check: bun run build && dnscontrol check --config dist/dnsconfig.js
scripts.preview: bun run build && dnscontrol preview --config dist/dnsconfig.js
scripts.push: bun run build && dnscontrol push --config dist/dnsconfig.js
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run fmt:check && bun run typecheck && bun run check
